title: 若駒Sの後に・『まぐれ』から

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is ecstatic that she was able to
surpass Tokai Teio in the Wakagoma Stakes and
lets out a shout of joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, seeing Tokai Teio's positive attitude
even in defeat instantly dampens her mood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She concludes that she was only able to win
because of luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest a trip to enter a local race, the Kokura
Kinen, to give her more confidence.
